description_long: This armchair features a high, winged backrest and angular armrests, all upholstered in a red and dark brown plaid fabric. The seat is wide and flat, seamlessly integrated with the back and arms, providing a structured and modern silhouette. The upholstery is tightly fitted, with no visible removable cushions, and the checkered pattern gives it a cozy, rustic appearance. The chair stands on four outwardly angled, tapered wooden legs, which add a touch of mid-century style and stability. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a solid frame likely made of wood beneath the fabric. This armchair would be suitable for urban parks, sidewalk seating areas, or stylish public waiting spaces.
description: A high-backed, winged armchair with red and brown plaid upholstery and tapered wooden legs, offering a modern yet rustic look. The chair is structured, with integrated arms and no visible removable cushions.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, high winged backrest, and angular armrests, all covered in plaid fabric.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular profile of the armrest and backrest, as well as the outwardly angled wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height and width of the backrest, with the plaid pattern uninterrupted and both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same angular armrest and leg design.
attribute_armrest_design: angular, padded and upholstered in plaid fabric
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, straight-edged with plaid upholstery
